---
title: "Puntos"
author: "Irene Ponce Huerta"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

###Corrige Data Camp

## Corrección de las entregas de Data Camp


```{r}
#Cargar las librerias
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
```
